hero.subtitle: Development studio focused on creating modern web applications, scalable platforms, and high-performance mobile experiences.

expertise.title: Our Expertise
expertise.webDesc: Fast, secure, and SEO-optimized Full Stack applications.
expertise.mobileDesc: Native and cross-platform solutions focused on performance.
expertise.devopsDesc: Hosting, CI/CD, containerization, and cloud architecture.

experience.title: Professional Experience
experience.climatempoDesc: Maintenance and evolution of legacy code (PHP/Twig) and integration via REST API with Next.js portals. Focused on critical analysis, adaptation of modern UI components, initial route structuring, and AdTech/SEO support.
experience.agroclimaDesc: Key participation in the conception of Agroclima, working on UI, API (BFF), and CI/CD pipeline. In the Civil Defense system, focused on collaborative performance optimization and architectural integration between modern Next.js and legacy PHP infrastructure.

lab.title: Laboratory & Projects
lab.subtitle: Open-source initiatives and experiments with new technologies in development.
lab.newsDesc: Backend focused on web scraping to aggregate pop culture, anime, and gaming news, processing data in real time.
lab.aiDesc: Local server infrastructure based on Docker running a reverse proxy and private instances of Large Language Models.
lab.tcgDesc: Web platform for bracket organization, registration management, and bracket tracking in local Trading Card Game tournaments.

footer.title: Ready to start your project?

challenges.title: Coding Challenges
challenges.subtitle: A collection of classic programming and algorithmic challenges implemented from scratch using HTML5 Canvas and TypeScript. A tribute to The Coding Train channel.
challenges.originalReferenceDesc: Check out the original inspiration and theoretical explanation of this challenge by the master Daniel Shiffman.

infra.title: Deployment Architecture
infra.description: This challenge was versioned via Git and delivered through an automated CI/CD pipeline to my private cluster.
